name: ritual
description: Ritual's Claude Code plugins — structured context and verification for agentic coding.

plugins.name: build-discipline
plugins.description: Build discipline for coding agents: surface assumptions and success criteria before writing code, keep changes surgical — and when a task is ambiguous or cross-cutting, run a Ritual exploration to gather the real context and verify it survived into the diff. The shared base; role packs depend on it.

plugins.name: developer
plugins.description: Role pack for developers. Job-native commands for developer work — discovery commands scope a job into a decision-ready Ritual brief before you build; standalone check commands run a local recipe (no Ritual needed). Depends on build-discipline.

plugins.name: frontend-developer
plugins.description: Role pack for frontend developers. Job-native commands for frontend developer work — discovery commands scope a job into a decision-ready Ritual brief before you build; standalone check commands run a local recipe (no Ritual needed). Depends on build-discipline.

plugins.name: backend-developer
plugins.description: Role pack for backend developers. Job-native commands for backend developer work — discovery commands scope a job into a decision-ready Ritual brief before you build; standalone check commands run a local recipe (no Ritual needed). Depends on build-discipline.

plugins.name: eng-lead
plugins.description: Role pack for eng leads. Job-native commands for eng lead work — discovery commands scope a job into a decision-ready Ritual brief before you build; standalone check commands run a local recipe (no Ritual needed). Depends on build-discipline.

plugins.name: devex-engineer
plugins.description: Role pack for devex engineers. Job-native commands for devex engineer work — discovery commands scope a job into a decision-ready Ritual brief before you build; standalone check commands run a local recipe (no Ritual needed). Depends on build-discipline.

plugins.name: product
plugins.description: Role pack for product managers — role-native discovery for product work (opportunity, customer problem, PRD, MVP scope, prioritization), routing each to the right canonical Ritual job under the product lens. Depends on build-discipline.

plugins.name: marketing
plugins.description: Role pack for marketers — role-native discovery for marketing work (positioning, launch brief, growth experiment), routing each to the right canonical Ritual job under the relevant marketing lens. Depends on build-discipline.
